title: poa bulbosa subsp. sinaica
intro: Poa bulbosa subsp. sinaica, also known as Chinese blue grass, is a plant species within the family Poaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of China and parts of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Poa bulbosa subsp. sinaica include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or dried extracts to harness its medicinal benefits.
